channel.title: Flutter-Web on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Flutter-Web on Arrans github.io

item.title: rustdesk/rustdesk
item.description: An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, as an alternative to TeamViewer.

item.title: leanflutter/window_manager
item.description: This plugin allows Flutter desktop apps to resizing and repositioning the window.
